name: Amazon Business American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn a $100 Amazon.com Gift Card instantly upon approval (non-Prime Amazon Business card).

earning_rates.category: Amazon Business, AWS, Amazon.com, Whole Foods
earning_rates.notes: 3% back on eligible U.S. purchases at Amazon Business, Amazon Web Services (AWS), Amazon.com, and Whole Foods Market

earning_rates.category: Restaurants, Gas Stations, Office Supply Stores
earning_rates.notes: 3% back at U.S. restaurants, U.S. gas stations, and U.S. office supply stores
1% back on all other eligible purchases

other_benefits: Flexible payment options: choose between paying over time (with interest) or paying in full each month

_no_credits_note: Amazon Business Amex non-Prime ($0 AF) — no recurring USD credits. Value is 3% Amazon (up to $150k/yr) + 2% gas/dining/wireless + 1% other. Plus baggage insurance (not credit). Verified 2026-04-27.
_card_status_alert: Card transitioning from Amex to U.S. Bank Aug 14 2026. New issuer card may have different benefits (still 3% Amazon for non-Prime).
